findings.source_excerpt: We can never have enough plots.
findings.description: "plots" here means âm mưu (schemes/plots), but it was mistranslated as "lô đất" (plots of land/real estate). The whole sentence becomes nonsensical.
findings.suggested_fix: Chúng ta không bao giờ có đủ âm mưu.

findings.source_excerpt: Harry was just going to stay eleven forever.
findings.target_excerpt: Harry sẽ ở lại lớp mười một mãi mãi.
findings.description: "stay eleven" refers to staying eleven years OLD forever, not staying in "lớp mười một" (the eleventh grade). Hogwarts has no grade eleven; this is an age reference.
findings.suggested_fix: Harry sẽ cứ mười một tuổi mãi mãi.

findings.source_excerpt: spells had been set in place to keep away the grindylows
findings.description: "grindylows" are magical water demons (a creature name). It was literally mistranslated as "bọn xay lúa" (grain-millers/grinders), which is nonsensical in the context of warding creatures away from a lake battle.
"REFORM ON ME" is a military order meaning re-form/regroup around the commander. It was mistranslated as "CẢI CÁCH" (reform as in political/structural reform). The tactical meaning is lost.

findings.source_excerpt: in real life, people usually cared about the other person
findings.target_excerpt: trong đời thực, mọi Muggle quan tâm đến người khác
findings.description: "people usually" was mistranslated as "mọi Muggle" (every Muggle). The passage is a general statement about people, not specifically Muggles, and the word "usually" is also dropped.
findings.suggested_fix: trong đời thực, mọi người thường quan tâm đến người khác

findings.source_excerpt: One of your soldiers has even become a quadruple agent.
findings.target_excerpt: đã trở thành bốn đặc vụ
findings.description: "a quadruple agent" (one agent serving four sides) was mistranslated as "bốn đặc vụ" (four agents). The follow-up dialogue ("Quadruple? But there's only three sides!") makes clear it is a single quadruple agent.
findings.suggested_fix: thậm chí đã trở thành điệp viên bốn mang

findings.source_excerpt: The terrifying part was how fast the whole thing had spiralled out of control.
findings.target_excerpt: Tanh ấy phần đáng sợ nhất
findings.description: "Tanh ấy" is gibberish / a typo at the start of the sentence. The later parallel passages (lines 26, 51) correctly begin "Điều đáng sợ là...".
findings.suggested_fix: Phần đáng sợ nhất là toàn bộ sự việc đã vượt khỏi tầm kiểm soát nhanh đến mức nào.

findings.source_excerpt: the atmosphere as tense, perhaps, but the phrase
findings.description: Words glued together with no space: "căng thẳngnhưng". (This file has a recurring pattern of formerly-italicized words being glued to the next word, e.g. "sẽlàm", "còntệ hơn", "đãloạn trí", "cóHufflepuffs"; this is a representative instance.)

findings.source_excerpt: There was a nervous chorus of yessirs.
findings.target_excerpt: Có một điệp khúc lo lắng của Yessirs.
findings.description: "yessirs" left untranslated as "Yessirs". Should be rendered in Vietnamese.
findings.suggested_fix: Có một dàn đồng thanh "vâng thưa ngài" đầy lo lắng.

findings.description: The slogan "Gryffindors for Chaos" is left entirely in English, although the parallel battle cries (e.g. "For Sunshine!" -> "Vì Ánh Nắng!") were translated elsewhere. Line 333 ("làm Gryffindors đó cho Sunshine") has the same issue.
findings.suggested_fix: "Người Gryffindor theo phe Hỗn loạn," cô nói

findings.source_excerpt: a symbol of friendship transcending Houses and allegiances
findings.target_excerpt: vượt qua các Gia tộc và lòng trung thành
findings.description: "Houses" (Hogwarts Houses) rendered as "Gia tộc" (clans/dynasties), contradicting the glossary term House -> Nhà.
findings.suggested_fix: vượt qua các Nhà và lòng trung thành

findings.source_excerpt: don't forget it's Merlin Says on Three.
findings.target_excerpt: đó là Merlin Says on Three
findings.description: "Merlin Says on Three" left in English. This is a play on the game "Simon Says" and should be translated.
findings.suggested_fix: đừng quên đó là trò Merlin Bảo ở lệnh thứ Ba

findings.target_excerpt: Anh đã được tha thứ rồi.
findings.description: Dumbledore is addressing the young girl Hermione ("cô Granger" in the same line), but the pronoun "Anh" (used for a male/peer) is wrong for her.

summary: Chapter is largely faithful but contains several genuine mistranslations where context-dependent words were rendered literally: "plots" -> "lô đất", "stay eleven" -> "lớp mười một", "grindylows" -> "bọn xay lúa", "REFORM ON ME" -> "CẢI CÁCH", "people" -> "mọi Muggle", plus a garbled opening word, glued-word spacing artifacts, and a few untranslated English fragments.
